positive: Minimalist illustration of a majestic crescent moon paired with a stylized, geometrically abstract forest silhouette. The moon should be rendered in glowing, warm celestial tones (gold, soft yellow), providing strong backlighting. The forest silhouettes should be deep indigo and forest green, forming an interconnected pattern of stylized trees and mountain peaks, achieving a clean, graphic look with strong contrast. Style: Modern tattoo flash, abstract vector art, clean line work, flat design principles, suitable for screen printing. Composition: Central, symmetrical, filling the frame evenly. Lighting: High contrast, halo effect on the moon. Color Palette: Deep cool tones contrasting with warm celestial glow. Resolution: High detail, crisp edges, perfect symmetry.
